steps.name: research
steps.description: Resolve identity, download, and summarize the ten target papers as paper assets.

steps.name: analysis
steps.description: Synthesize findings across the ten papers grouped by the five themes; identify backlog suggestions strengthened or weakened.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Write task-level documents (plan, research, results), run all verificators, finalize, commit, and merge.
